hero.question: Will Anthropic have the best AI model at the end of March 2026?
hero.prob_take: The crowd has essentially handed Anthropic the crown at 94%, pricing in a world where Claude stays ahead of GPT-4o, Gemini 2.0, and whatever else ships in the next 14 months. That's a lot of certainty to bake into a fast-moving race where benchmark chasing is the game and "best" is messier than the market assumes.

daily_take.headline: Anthropic's 94% dominance crack signals reality check incoming for AI supremacy bets
daily_take.deck: Anthropic's best-in-class odds shed 3.9 points in 24 hours on $1.1M volume, a rare dent in what looked like consensus pricing. The market is pricing near-certainty for a company that still trails GPT-4o in most benchmarks and faces relentless iteration from OpenAI, Google, and Meta. Smart money doesn't pay 94% for a prediction that depends on continuous technical dominance in the fastest-moving field on Earth. Fade this.
